_comment_api_key: Copy this file to arc_config.json and paste the plaintext key from the Credentials tab on arcvelvet.com. arc_config.json is gitignored. NEVER share, screenshot, or zip-with-share this file once populated — it holds a live API credential.
_comment_v1_0_0_note: v1.0.0 cutover: the previous 'text_encoder_patterns' field is no longer honored — the server is now the manifest-redaction authority and uses a fixed catch-all walk ('textencode' substring + text/prompt field-name match) identical to the node's extraction walk. There is nothing to configure on the node side for prompt handling. Delete arc_config.json's text_encoder_patterns field if upgrading from a previous version; the node will ignore it silently.
